description.content: Routes for auth

| firstName | string | Required |
| lastName | string | Required |

| password | string | Required |
| profileImage | string | Optional |
| role | string | Optional |
| phoneNo | object | Optional |
| phoneNo.countryCode | string | Optional |
| phoneNo.number | string | Optional |

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Daniel Smith",
  "designation": "Senior engineer",
  "description": "This digital agency completely transformed our online presence. Their expertise, creativity, and attention to detail exceeded all our expectations. We highly recommend their outstanding services!",
  "image": "assets/img/testimonials/1.png",
  "isActive": true
}
